attributes.label: Async
attributes.description: Allows an action to run in parallel instead of waiting in the component request queue.
attributes.note: Use this only for side effects. Avoid it when the action mutates state that drives the UI.

attributes.label: Authorize
attributes.description: Authorizes access to a Livewire action method using Laravel authorization.
attributes.note: Use `#[Authorize('update', 'post')]` to authorize against a method parameter or component property named `post`.

attributes.label: Computed
attributes.description: Turns a method into a cached derived property for the current request.
attributes.note: Computed values are accessed in Blade as `$this->posts`, not `$posts`.

attributes.label: Defer
attributes.description: Loads a component immediately after the initial page render instead of blocking first paint.

attributes.label: Isolate
attributes.description: Sends a component request separately so it can run in parallel instead of being bundled.

attributes.label: Js
attributes.description: Marks a PHP method that returns JavaScript to execute directly in the browser.
attributes.note: These methods run without a server roundtrip when called from `$wire.methodName()`.

attributes.label: Json
attributes.description: Marks an action as a JSON endpoint that returns data directly to JavaScript.
attributes.note: JSON actions skip rendering and reject with structured validation errors when validation fails.

attributes.label: Layout
attributes.description: Sets the Blade layout for a full-page Livewire component.

attributes.label: Lazy
attributes.description: Loads a component only once it enters the viewport.

attributes.label: Locked
attributes.description: Prevents a public property from being modified by the client.

attributes.label: Modelable
attributes.description: Allows a child component property to be bound from a parent using `wire:model`.

attributes.label: On
attributes.description: Registers a listener that runs the method when a Livewire event is dispatched.
attributes.note: Pass the event name, for example `#[On('post-created')]`.

attributes.label: Reactive
attributes.description: Makes an incoming child prop update automatically when the parent changes it.

attributes.label: Renderless
attributes.description: Skips the render phase after an action finishes.

attributes.label: Rule
attributes.description: Legacy validation attribute kept for backward compatibility with older Livewire code.
attributes.parameters: $rule = null, $attribute = null, $as = null, $message = null, $onUpdate = true, bool $translate = true

attributes.label: Session
attributes.description: Persists a public property in the session between requests and page visits.

attributes.label: Title
attributes.description: Sets the document title for a full-page Livewire component.

attributes.label: Transition
attributes.description: Configures the view-transition type for an action method.
attributes.note: Pair it with `wire:transition` on the element you want the browser to animate.

attributes.label: Url
attributes.description: Keeps a public property synchronized with the query string so state is shareable and bookmarkable.
attributes.note: Use options like `as`, `history`, `keep`, `except`, or `nullable` to control the query key and history behavior.

attributes.label: Validate
attributes.description: Associates validation rules with a property so rules live next to the state they validate.
attributes.parameters: $rule = null, $attribute = null, $as = null, $message = null, $onUpdate = true, bool $translate = true
attributes.note: Use `#[Validate('required|min:3')]`; set `onUpdate: false` if updates should not validate immediately.

traits.label: WithPagination
traits.description: Adds paginator state plus helpers like `getPage()`, `resetPage()`, and `setPage()` to the component.

traits.label: WithoutUrlPagination
traits.description: Keeps pagination state out of the query string when using `WithPagination`.

traits.label: WithFileUploads
traits.description: Enables Livewire temporary file uploads and upload-aware validation.

lifecycleMethods.label: boot
lifecycleMethods.description: Runs at the beginning of every request, including the initial one.

lifecycleMethods.label: mount
lifecycleMethods.description: Runs once when the component is first created.

lifecycleMethods.label: booted
lifecycleMethods.description: Runs after `boot` and `mount` or `hydrate` have completed.

lifecycleMethods.label: hydrate
lifecycleMethods.description: Runs when the component is re-hydrated on a subsequent request.

lifecycleMethods.label: dehydrate
lifecycleMethods.description: Runs before the component is serialized back to the frontend.

lifecycleMethods.label: updating
lifecycleMethods.description: Runs before a public property is updated from the client.

lifecycleMethods.label: updated
lifecycleMethods.description: Runs after a public property has been updated from the client.

lifecycleMethods.label: rendering
lifecycleMethods.description: Runs just before the component view is rendered.

lifecycleMethods.label: rendered
lifecycleMethods.description: Runs after the component view has been rendered.

lifecycleMethods.label: exception
lifecycleMethods.description: Runs when an exception is thrown inside the component lifecycle.

componentMethods.label: dispatch
componentMethods.description: Dispatches a Livewire event that other components can listen for.

componentMethods.label: validate
componentMethods.description: Validates the component and returns the validated payload.

componentMethods.label: validateOnly
componentMethods.description: Validates a single property against the component's validation rules.

componentMethods.label: withValidator
componentMethods.description: Registers a callback to customize the validator before validation runs.

componentMethods.label: addError
componentMethods.description: Adds a validation error message to the component error bag.

componentMethods.label: resetErrorBag
componentMethods.description: Clears all validation errors or errors for a specific field.

componentMethods.label: clearValidation
componentMethods.description: Alias for clearing validation errors.

componentMethods.label: resetValidation
componentMethods.description: Alias for resetting validation errors.

componentMethods.label: getErrorBag
componentMethods.description: Returns the component's validation error bag.

componentMethods.label: reset
componentMethods.description: Resets one or more public properties back to their initial values.

componentMethods.label: resetExcept
componentMethods.description: Resets all public properties except the provided property names.

componentMethods.label: pull
componentMethods.description: Reads a property value and resets it in the same step.

componentMethods.label: fill
componentMethods.description: Mass assigns public properties from an array or object.

componentMethods.label: all
componentMethods.description: Returns all public properties defined on the component subclass.

componentMethods.label: only
componentMethods.description: Returns only the named public properties.

componentMethods.label: except
componentMethods.description: Returns all public properties except the named properties.

componentMethods.label: redirect
componentMethods.description: Redirects from inside an action and skips rendering by default.

componentMethods.label: redirectRoute
componentMethods.description: Redirects to a named Laravel route.

componentMethods.label: redirectIntended
componentMethods.description: Redirects to the intended URL from the session, falling back to a default.

componentMethods.label: redirectAction
componentMethods.description: Redirects to a controller action URL.

componentMethods.label: skipRender
componentMethods.description: Skips the render pass for the current request.

componentMethods.label: renderless
componentMethods.description: Alias for `skipRender()`.

componentMethods.label: forceRender
componentMethods.description: Forces rendering even if something has requested that rendering be skipped.

componentMethods.label: stream
componentMethods.description: Streams content to a `wire:stream` target without waiting for the action to finish.
componentMethods.parameters: $content = null, $replace = false, $name = null, $el = null, $ref = null, $to = null
componentMethods.note: Use `$this->stream(to: 'target', content: '...', replace: true)` or chain `$this->stream('...')->to('target')`.

componentMethods.label: js
componentMethods.description: Queues JavaScript to run in the browser after the request.

componentMethods.label: getPage
componentMethods.description: Returns the current page for a paginator when using `WithPagination`.

componentMethods.label: previousPage
componentMethods.description: Moves the paginator to the previous page when using `WithPagination`.

componentMethods.label: nextPage
componentMethods.description: Moves the paginator to the next page when using `WithPagination`.

componentMethods.label: gotoPage
componentMethods.description: Moves the paginator to a specific page when using `WithPagination`.

componentMethods.label: resetPage
componentMethods.description: Resets the paginator to the first page when using `WithPagination`.

componentMethods.label: setPage
componentMethods.description: Moves the paginator to a specific page when using `WithPagination`.

directives.label: @livewire
directives.description: Renders a Livewire component from a Blade view.

directives.label: @this
directives.description: Outputs the JavaScript component object for the current Livewire component.

directives.label: @script
directives.description: Wraps JavaScript that should run with the Livewire component instance available.

directives.label: @endscript
directives.description: Ends a Livewire `@script` block.

directives.label: @assets
directives.description: Wraps scripts or styles that should be loaded once for a component.

directives.label: @endassets
directives.description: Ends a Livewire `@assets` block.

directives.label: @persist
directives.description: Persists a DOM fragment across `wire:navigate` page visits.

directives.label: @endpersist
directives.description: Ends a Livewire `@persist` block.

directives.label: @island
directives.description: Defines a named Livewire island block inside a component.
directives.note: Actions inside the island only re-render that island. Pass `with: [...]` to provide scoped data.

directives.label: @endisland
directives.description: Ends a Livewire `@island` block.

directives.label: @livewireScripts
directives.description: Outputs Livewire's browser scripts.

directives.label: @livewireScriptConfig
directives.description: Outputs Livewire's script configuration for manually bundled assets.

directives.label: @livewireStyles
directives.description: Outputs Livewire's styles when needed by features such as file uploads or navigation.

directives.label: wire:key
directives.description: Gives a DOM fragment or child component a stable identity across updates.

directives.label: wire:model
directives.description: Binds an input to a public property. By default it syncs on the next action instead of every keystroke.

directives.label: wire:click
directives.description: Calls a component action when the element is clicked.

directives.label: wire:submit
directives.description: Intercepts a form submit, prevents the default browser request, and calls a component action.

directives.label: wire:change
directives.description: Calls a component action when the change event fires.

directives.label: wire:input
directives.description: Calls a component action when the input event fires.

directives.label: wire:keydown
directives.description: Calls a component action when a key is pressed. Supports Alpine key and event modifiers.

directives.label: wire:confirm
directives.description: Adds a browser confirmation dialog before another Livewire action runs.
directives.note: Use `.prompt` with `Question text|expected input` when the user must type a specific confirmation.

directives.label: wire:loading
directives.description: Shows, hides, or styles an element while a request is in flight.

directives.label: wire:target
directives.description: Scopes loading or dirty indicators to one or more specific actions or properties.

directives.label: wire:dirty
directives.description: Shows, hides, or styles an element while values are dirty.

directives.label: wire:init
directives.description: Runs an action when the component initializes in the browser.

directives.label: wire:show
directives.description: Toggles an element using CSS display instead of removing it from the DOM.

directives.label: wire:ignore
directives.description: Tells Livewire to leave the element contents alone so third-party JS can manage them.

directives.label: wire:replace
directives.description: Replaces content instead of diffing children when the component re-renders.

directives.label: wire:offline
directives.description: Shows, hides, or styles an element when the browser goes offline.

directives.label: wire:poll
directives.description: Refreshes a component or calls an action on a fixed interval.

directives.label: wire:navigate
directives.description: Turns a normal link into a faster SPA-like Livewire visit.

directives.label: wire:current
directives.description: Adds classes to the currently active link.

directives.label: wire:intersect
directives.description: Runs an action when an element enters the viewport.

directives.label: wire:intersect:enter
directives.description: Runs an action when an element enters the viewport.

directives.label: wire:intersect:leave
directives.description: Runs an action when an element leaves the viewport.

directives.label: wire:stream
directives.description: Marks an element as a target for server-streamed content updates.
directives.note: The value should match the `to`/target name passed to `$this->stream(...)`.

directives.label: wire:text
directives.description: Updates text content from a client-side expression without waiting for a full re-render.

directives.label: wire:transition
directives.description: Uses the browser View Transitions API when an element appears, disappears, or changes.

directives.label: wire:ref
directives.description: Names an element or child component so it can be targeted later from JavaScript.
directives.note: Read it with `$wire.$refs.name` or dispatch from it with `$wire.$dispatchRef('name', 'event')`.

directives.label: wire:sort
directives.description: Makes a list sortable and calls a handler with the moved item id and position.
directives.note: The handler receives `($item, $position)`, plus `$id` when `wire:sort:group-id` is present.

directives.label: wire:sort:item
directives.description: Marks an individual sortable item with its unique identifier.

directives.label: wire:sort:group
directives.description: Groups sortable containers so items can move between them.

directives.label: wire:sort:group-id
directives.description: Passes an additional group identifier to the sort handler.

directives.label: wire:sort:handle
directives.description: Restricts drag initiation to a specific handle element.

directives.label: wire:sort:ignore
directives.description: Prevents an inner element from triggering drag interactions.

directives.label: wire:cloak
directives.description: Hides an element until Livewire has fully initialized on the page.

directives.label: wire:bind
directives.description: Binds an attribute value through Livewire's client-side binding support.
directives.note: Use the suffix for the attribute, for example `wire:bind:class="className"` or `wire:bind:disabled="disabled"`.

directives.label: wire:island
directives.description: Scopes the action triggered from this element to a named Livewire island.
directives.note: Place it on the action element, for example `<button wire:click="loadMore" wire:island.append="feed">`.

$wire.label: $get
$wire.description: Reads a Livewire property value from the client-side component state.

$wire.label: $set
$wire.description: Sets a Livewire property value and optionally sends a request.
$wire.note: Call `$wire.$set('title', value, false)` to update client state without immediately syncing.

$wire.label: $call
$wire.description: Calls a Livewire component action by name.
$wire.note: Use `$wire.$call('save', arg1, arg2)` when the action name is dynamic; otherwise `$wire.save()` is equivalent.

$wire.label: $refresh
$wire.description: Refreshes the component by sending a commit with no action.

$wire.label: $commit
$wire.description: Commits queued client-side state changes to the server.

$wire.label: $toggle
$wire.description: Toggles a boolean Livewire property and optionally sends a request.
$wire.note: Pass `false` as the second argument to defer syncing, for example `$wire.$toggle('open', false)`.

$wire.label: $entangle
$wire.description: Creates an Alpine-compatible two-way binding to a Livewire property.
$wire.note: Use `$wire.$entangle('property')`; pass `true` as the second argument for live syncing.

$wire.label: $watch
$wire.description: Watches a Livewire property path and runs a callback when it changes.
$wire.note: Returns an unwatch function, so store and call it if you need to stop watching.

$wire.label: $effect
$wire.description: Registers an Alpine effect scoped to the component lifecycle.

$wire.label: $on
$wire.description: Listens for a Livewire event scoped to the current component.
$wire.note: The callback receives the event detail payload.

$wire.label: $dispatch
$wire.description: Dispatches a Livewire event from the current component.

$wire.label: $dispatchSelf
$wire.description: Dispatches a Livewire event only to the current component.

$wire.label: $dispatchTo
$wire.description: Dispatches a Livewire event to components by name.

$wire.label: $dispatchEl
$wire.description: Dispatches a DOM event from elements matching a selector inside the component.
$wire.note: Use `$wire.$dispatchEl('[data-menu]', 'opened', params)`.

$wire.label: $dispatchRef
$wire.description: Dispatches an event from an element found by `wire:ref`.
$wire.note: Use `$wire.$dispatchRef('menu', 'opened', params)`.

$wire.label: $hook
$wire.description: Registers a JavaScript lifecycle hook scoped to this component.
$wire.note: Returns an unhook function for removing the listener.

$wire.label: $intercept
$wire.description: Intercepts component actions for the current component.
$wire.note: Pass a callback for all actions or `(actionName, callback)` for one action.

$wire.label: $interceptAction
$wire.description: Intercepts component actions for the current component.
$wire.note: Pass a callback for all actions or `(actionName, callback)` for one action.

$wire.label: $interceptMessage
$wire.description: Intercepts Livewire messages for the current component.
$wire.note: Pass a callback for all messages or `(actionName, callback)` for messages containing one action.

$wire.label: $interceptRequest
$wire.description: Intercepts Livewire requests for the current component.
$wire.note: Pass a callback for all requests or `(actionName, callback)` for requests containing one action.

$wire.label: $upload
$wire.description: Uploads a file to a Livewire file upload property.
$wire.parameters: name, file, finishCallback = () => { }, errorCallback = () => { }, progressCallback = () => { }, cancelledCallback = () => { }
$wire.note: Use `$wire.$upload('photo', file, finish, error, progress, cancel)`.

$wire.label: $uploadMultiple
$wire.description: Uploads multiple files to a Livewire file upload property.
$wire.parameters: name, files, finishCallback = () => { }, errorCallback = () => { }, progressCallback = () => { }, cancelledCallback = () => { }, append = true
$wire.note: Use `$wire.$uploadMultiple('photos', files, finish, error, progress, cancel)`.

$wire.label: $removeUpload
$wire.description: Removes an uploaded temporary file from a file upload property.
$wire.note: Use `$wire.$removeUpload('photo', tmpFilename, finish)`.

$wire.label: $cancelUpload
$wire.description: Cancels an in-progress file upload.
$wire.note: Use `$wire.$cancelUpload('photo', cancelCallback)`.

$wire.label: $js
$wire.description: Registers or calls client-side JavaScript actions for the component.
$wire.note: Define actions with `$wire.$js('name', callback)` or `$wire.$js.name = callback`, then call them as `$js.name()` from Livewire expressions.

$wire.label: $refs
$wire.description: Looks up elements by `wire:ref` name.
$wire.note: Use either `$wire.$refs('name')` or `$wire.$refs.name`.

$wire.label: $dirty
$wire.description: Returns whether a property or the component has dirty state.
$wire.note: Call without arguments for the whole component or with a property path like `$wire.$dirty('title')`.

$wire.label: $errors
$wire.description: Exposes validation errors for the component in JavaScript.

$wire.label: $el
$wire.description: The component root DOM element.

$wire.label: $id
$wire.description: The current Livewire component id.

$wire.label: $parent
$wire.description: The nearest parent Livewire component's `$wire` object.
$wire.note: Use from a child component, for example `$wire.$parent.save()` or `wire:click="$parent.save"`.

$wire.label: $island
$wire.description: Targets a named island for the next action.
$wire.note: Chain the action after the island name, for example `$wire.$island('feed').loadMore()` or `$wire.$island('feed').$refresh()`.

magicProperties.label: $wire
magicProperties.description: Accesses the nearest Livewire component's JavaScript API from Alpine expressions.

magicProperties.label: $js
magicProperties.description: Accesses Livewire JavaScript actions from Alpine expressions.

magicProperties.label: $queryString
magicProperties.description: Tracks Alpine state in the URL query string through Livewire's history plugin.
magicProperties.note: Use in Alpine state like `search: $queryString('')`; chain `.as('q')`, `.alwaysShow()`, or `.usePush()`.

globalLivewire.label: Livewire.dispatchTo
globalLivewire.description: Dispatches an event to components by name.

globalLivewire.label: Livewire.on
globalLivewire.description: Listens for a global Livewire event.

globalLivewire.label: Livewire.find
globalLivewire.description: Finds a Livewire component by id and returns its `$wire` object.

globalLivewire.label: Livewire.first
globalLivewire.description: Returns the first Livewire component's `$wire` object on the page.

globalLivewire.label: Livewire.getByName
globalLivewire.description: Returns Livewire components matching a component name.

globalLivewire.label: Livewire.all
globalLivewire.description: Returns all Livewire components on the page.

globalLivewire.label: Livewire.hook
globalLivewire.description: Registers a Livewire JavaScript lifecycle hook.

globalLivewire.label: Livewire.trigger
globalLivewire.description: Triggers a Livewire JavaScript hook synchronously.

globalLivewire.label: Livewire.triggerAsync
globalLivewire.description: Triggers a Livewire JavaScript hook asynchronously.

globalLivewire.label: Livewire.fireAction
globalLivewire.description: Fires a component action from JavaScript.

globalLivewire.label: Livewire.start
globalLivewire.description: Starts Livewire manually when auto-start is disabled.
